title: taraxacum subditivum
intro: Taraxacum subditivum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum subditivum include treating digestive issues, reducing blood pressure, and supporting liver health, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
